desc: Wages: economic package status — committee notes on the four-year general wage increase ask.
name: Wages: economic package status

desc: Healthcare: premium contribution redline — counter company's 20 percent employee share proposal.
name: Healthcare: premium contribution redline

desc: COLA: restoration proposal — model quarterly trigger tied to CPI-W for skilled and production.
name: COLA: restoration proposal

desc: Pension: contribution language — push multiplier increase and improved early-retirement factor.
name: Pension: contribution language

desc: Seniority: bid-procedure language — clarify plant-wide bid windows and bump rights.
name: Seniority: bid-procedure language

desc: Safety: line-speed committee position — demand joint authority to halt the line over ergonomic risk.
name: Safety: line-speed committee position

desc: Overtime: equalization language — tighten the hours chart and define make-up OT opportunities.
name: Overtime: equalization language

desc: Subcontracting: protective language — require 90-day notice and union right to bid on outsourced work.
name: Subcontracting: protective language

desc: Grievance procedure: Step timelines — shorten company answer deadlines at Steps 2 and 3.
name: Grievance procedure: Step timelines

desc: Successorship: clause review — ensure contract binds any buyer or spun-off operation.
name: Successorship: clause review

desc: Ratification: timeline planning — set membership meeting dates and ballot logistics for tentative agreement.
name: Ratification: timeline planning

desc: Strike authorization: contingency — draft authorization vote plan and hardship fund readiness.
name: Strike authorization: contingency

desc: Skilled trades: apprenticeship ratio — propose two-to-one journeyman ratio and posting language.
name: Skilled trades: apprenticeship ratio

desc: Shift premiums: afternoon and night rate — propose increase to afternoon 8 percent, night 12 percent.
name: Shift premiums: afternoon and night rate

desc: Attendance: point-system rollback — propose lower point values and 90-day rolling reset.
name: Attendance: point-system rollback

desc: Layoff and recall: SUB pay improvement — extend supplemental unemployment benefit weeks and eligibility.
name: Layoff and recall: SUB pay improvement

desc: Discipline: progressive steps — propose expungement of records after twelve months clean.
name: Discipline: progressive steps

desc: Grievance #2026-114: termination of D. Robinson — gather time records and witness statements.
name: Grievance #2026-114: unjust termination

desc: Grievance #2026-098: improper subcontracting on body shop — resolved, work returned to bargaining unit.
name: Grievance #2026-098: subcontracting violation

desc: Vacation language: schedule guarantee — propose four-week summer shutdown and improved accrual schedule.
name: Vacation language: schedule guarantee
